opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My urine stream has slowed to a painful trickle, I have to push with all my might just to pass a few drops, and my lower stomach is constantly aching. I've been on the toilet for hours and I'm exhausted.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's been getting steadily weaker for months but tonight it's much worse — I'm straining and straining and barely anything comes out, and the aching in my lower belly won't let up.

symptom_narrative.onset: a slow, creeping change over about the last six months, much worse tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: six months of gradual worsening; the severe episode has been going on all evening
symptom_narrative.character: a weak, narrow, splayed stream that sprays and dribbles; I have to strain hard with my belly to get anything out
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: tonight it's the worst it's been — just a painful trickle no matter how hard I push
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the flow itself, and a constant dull ache low down in my stomach
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse the longer the night goes on; every trip to the toilet takes ages
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really helps; sitting sometimes feels slightly less of a strain
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to force it out; standing to go seems to make the straining harder
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a feeling that my bladder never fully empties, and a lot of dribbling right after I finish
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the weak stream has crept up over months but I've never been this blocked before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm completely worn out — I've spent hours in the bathroom and can't sleep for the trips and the aching

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I had a surgery about five years ago and they had trouble putting a catheter in — it was rough and painful at the time
past_medical_history.how_managed: it was during a hospital operation for something else

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: saw palmetto (a herbal prostate supplement I bought over the counter)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: living independently; severely sleep-deprived and physically exhausted from the straining and constant bathroom trips tonight

objective_data_offered.value: only a few drops each time even after pushing hard for a long time
about 82 kg on my home scales
no fever or shivering that I've noticed, and I haven't seen any blood in what little urine I pass
